title: Script's Difficulty Balancer
description: Tweak gameplay behavior for specific players to balance difficulty.
body:
Script's Difficulty Balancer provides tools to make the survival experience as fun as possible for everybody. This mod adds options for server administrators to tweak certain aspects of the game on a per-player basis to tailor the experience for everyone.

### Usage

```
/balance <player> <option> <true|false>
```

Options:
- `keepInventory`
- `keepXp`
- `preventBreakingNamedTools`

Example:
```
/balance Player123 keepXp true
```

Planned options:
- Prevent mob griefing around player
